rows.label: qev051502_MSG0002
rows.name: ...Perhaps you have completely forgotten about me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051502_MSG0003
rows.name:
I... have devoted myself to training without forgetting
the humiliation of that defeat for a single moment![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051502_MSG0004
rows.name:
Now is the time to show you the results... the true form of the sword
taught to me by my esteemed brothers![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051502_MSG0005
rows.name:
Now then... here I go!
Come at me with everything you have![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051502_MSG0007
rows.name:
That day... I clashed with you with all my might...
And I lost![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051502_MSG0008
rows.name:
But, in order to answer my brothers' feelings hidden
in the three katana you thrust before me,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051502_MSG0009
rows.name: I have trained desperately up until this very day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051502_MSG0010
rows.name:
Now is the time to show you the results... the true form of the sword
taught to me by my esteemed brothers![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051502_MSG0011
rows.name:
Now then... here I go!
Come at me with everything you have![ST:wait ]
